mapper.select: SELECT account_id, login_account,login_ip,register_ip,register_phone,register_email,register_time FROM sys_account WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

INSERT INTO sys_account ( account_id, login_account, login_password, login_ip, register_ip, register_phone, register_email, register_time, last_login_time ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{loginAccount}, #{loginPassword}, #{loginIp}, #{registerIp}, #{registerPhone}, #{registerEmail}, #{registerTime}, #{lastLoginTime} )

UPDATE sys_account SET
login_password = #{loginPassword},
login_ip = #{loginIp},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime},
register_phone = #{registerPhone},
register_email = #{registerEmail},
WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
